display.value: Knee alignment W standing X-ray measured
Knee medial AndOr lateral instability W full extension
Knee AP instability W 90 degree flexion
Additional portable medical orders or instructions
Portable medical order AndOr advance directive review
Blood flow rate Unspecified body region CVVH
Blood volume Unspecified body region CVVHD
Information to tell doctors if you experience failing health with a low chance of recovery Narrative - Reported
Continuous glucose monitor device [Date and time] Reporting Period start - Reported
Continuous glucose monitor device [Date and time] Reporting Period end - Reported
Days continuous glucose monitor device worn [#] Reporting Period Estimated
Percentage of time continuous glucose monitor device worn Reporting Period Calculated
Racial and ethnic minority status [Percentile] Reporting Period
National socioeconomic disadvantage rank Reporting Period
State socioeconomic disadvantage rank Reporting Period
Population with no social vulnerability factors [#] Reporting Period Community
Population with no social vulnerability factors Reporting Period Community
Particle matter 2.5 [#/volume] Reporting Period Community Calculated
Census tract medically underserved area [Score] Reporting Period Calculated
Medically underserved county area [Score] Reporting Period Community Calculated
Overall social vulnerability index Reporting Period
Index housing type and transportation Reporting Period
How much time is usually spent on screens
Thoughts on life sustaining treatment Narrative - Reported
Number of stairs to enter home
History of Other nonmedical drug use note
Gas delivery source Respiratory system --post exercise
Number of steps in 24 hour Measured
Number of steps in 24 hour mean Measured
Number of steps in 1 week Measured
Walking speed in the past week maximum Calculated
Walking speed in the past week mean Calculated
Clinical finding absent [Identifier] Population Narrative Investigation
Clinical finding present [Identifier] Population Narrative Investigation
Number of steps in unspecified time Pedometer
Calories burned in unspecified time Pedometer
Age of onset of health-related event Family member
Oxygen/Gas total [Pure volume fraction] Inhaled gas
Goals, preferences, and priorities for medical treatment Narrative - Reported
Allowance to change advance directive preferences in the future regardless of mental state Narrative - Reported
Decision to inform doctors and nurses about the role religion, faith, culture, or spirituality play in my life Narrative - Reported
Preference on consulting a supportive and palliative care team to help treat physical, emotional, and spiritual discomfort and support family Narrative - Reported
Information to tell doctors if my health deteriorates due to a terminal illness and I am unable to interact meaningfully with family, friends, or surroundings Narrative - Reported

Information to tell doctors if I have a severe, irreversible brain injury or illness and can't dress, feed, or bathe myself, or communicate my medical wishes, but can be kept alive Narrative - Reported
Thoughts on cardiopulmonary resuscitation (CPR) Narrative - Reported
Preferred location to spend final days if possible to choose Narrative - Reported
Thoughts on organ and tissue donations Narrative - Reported
Powers granted to healthcare agent Narrative - Reported
Advance directive - request for tube feeding
Advance directive - request for life support
Advance directive - request for IV fluid and support
Advance directive - request for resuscitation that differs from cardiopulmonary resuscitation
Other directives that have not otherwise been documented Narrative - Reported
Thoughts on artificial nutrition and hydration Narrative - Reported
Procedure that confirmed birth defect diagnosis
Disease analysis overall interpretation Blood or Tissue Narrative
Type of education program assigned to patient
Date education program assigned to Patient
Date education program started by Patient
Date education program completed by Patient
Date education program expires for Patient
Site of adjacent organ or tissue involvement Cancer specimen
Laboratory communication about newborn screening Narrative
Thoughts on tube feeding Narrative - Reported
Thoughts on IV fluid and support Narrative - Reported
Goals AndOr preferences in order of priority - Reported
Circumstances that activate healthcare agent's powers Narrative - Reported
Healthcare agent appointment intended to be valid in any jurisdiction - Reported
Healthcare agent authority to inspect and disclose mental and physical health information Narrative - Reported
Healthcare agent authority to inspect and disclose specially protected health information Narrative - Reported
Limitations placed on healthcare agent Narrative - Reported
Consent for healthcare agent to deviate from stated goals, preferences and priorities Narrative - Reported
Compensation for healthcare agent Narrative - Reported
Thoughts on life-sustaining procedures if pregnant Narrative - Reported
Thoughts on pain management Narrative - Reported
Do Not Resuscitate, Do Not Attempt Resuscitation, or Allow Natural Death order is in place - Reported
Medical Order for Life-Sustaining Treatment, Physician Order for Life-Sustaining Treatment, or a similar medical order is in place - Reported
Thoughts on hastening death Narrative - Reported
